modal.title: Whakauru whakaaro mai i etahi atanga
modal.sub_title: Whakaputa whakaaro mai i to taputapu whakaaro o nāianei, whakauru ki konei

success.title: Whakauruhia ana ki te whai wāhi
success.sub_title: Whakaatuhia ngā whakaaroruhia katoa i raro i te ripanga i raro nei

error.title: Whakauruhia kāore i whai wāhi. Whakamātau anō
error.subtitle: I whiwhiwhi i te hapa e whakauru ana i ngā whakaaro. Whakamātau anō i tetahi wa ke atu.
error.fail_provider: I whakapau kaha te whakauru, ki te whakamahi i te kaituku whaihua tika
error.fail_structure: Kāore e whakapau kaha ana te hangararara me te whakaputa o ngā mara o te kōnae i whakaputaina! Whakamāmā me whakamātau anō kia whai i te āhua tono me te whakamātau anō
error.fail_type: Me whakapau kaha te āhua kōnae hei āhua: csv, .xlsx.
error.fail_structure_detail: I whakauruhia he kōnae mai i <1>{{source}}</1>. Kei te ngaro ngā āpure i whakauruhia i te kōnae i whakauruhia. Tirohia anō te kōnae me whakauru anō. Ki te whai i te āwhina, pāwhiritia te pātene '<1>{{btn}}</1>' i raro nei ki te kōrero tahi ki a mātou.

modal.import_processing_title: Kua whakaputaina tō kōnae i te whakapau kaha!
modal.import_processing_message: Ka taea e te whakapau kaha te whakaputanga i te wā e taha meneti. Ka whakamōhio atu mātou ki tō īmēra toa {{email}} i te whakakore. Whakamāhia te pūkete īmēra, tae atu ki ngā kōpaki whakapau kōrero me ngā whakapānui.

table.empty_message: He whakaaro kua whiwhi katoa koe! Kāore he whakaaro hōu ki te pānui i tēnei wā.
table.no_review_approve: Uh oh, kua whai wāhi te wā! Tukuna he whakamōhio aroha ki ō whakatūpono me te pānui ki a rātou ki te whakapau kōrero me te whakatika i ō rātou whakaaro.
table.search_helptext: Whakamāmātia ngā tātari, te rerenga rānei
table.modal_delete_warning: Ka muku tēnei mahi i te whakaaro i whiriwhiria ai ake nei mo ake tonu atu
table.modal_reply_all_placeholder: Tauira: Mihi ana māu mo tō whakaaro! Kei te hari matou ki te whakarongo ka whakamārama koe e whakamahia ana e te whaihua. Ki te he pātai, whakapā mai. Ka whakamanahia e matou to tautoko!
table.modal_reply_all_warning: Kei ētahi whakararuraru kua whiriwhiria atu nei e ētahi whakaaro i whakautu. He whai whakakaha rānei ki te whakapau kaha i te whakautu hōu, ka whakakore i te mea kei mua i a rātou?
table.modal_warning_content: He whakatika! Muku i tēnei whakaaro ka whakapau kaha ki te whakaaro mai a nga kaihoko. Whakaaro ki te whakautu i te whakaaro i whakatika ake nei.
table.modal_warning_delete_response: Whakatika ake! Muku i tō whakautu ki tēnei whakaaro ka whakarere i te whakautu a te kaihoko. Whakaaro ki te whakatika i te whakautu i whakatika ake nei, ka whakakore i te mahi i tō whakautu i whakatika ake nei.
table.modal_warning_title: Kei te whakapau kaha koe ki te muku i tēnei whakaaro
table.review_with_media: Me te whakaaro me te ataata/whakaaturanga
table.subtitle_pending_review: Whiwhi whakaaro mā te whakatū i te īmēra tono, te whakauru rānei
table.subtitle_approved_review: Tirohia ngā whakararuraru tatari me whakaatuhia whānuitia i runga i tō toa
table.subtitle_unpublished_reviews: Whakaatuhia ngā whakararuraru e whakararuraru ana. Whakaputa anō i a rātou i te wā e hiahia ana!
table.change_product: Kōwhiria he whakaputa anō hei whakawhiti i tēnei whakararuraru
table.number_of_report: Kua pūrongotia tēnei arotake {{number}} ngā wā.

report_options.report_3: Kei roto ngā pānuitanga, pāme rānei
report_options.report_4: Kei roto ngā ihirangi tutu me te whakarihariha

review_detail.reply_placeholder: Whakautu ki ngā arotake a te kiritaki mā tōu urupare...
review_detail.send_notice_helptext: Tukua he īmēra whakamōhio ki te kiritaki me tōu whakautu
review_detail.send_notice_sub_helptext: Whakahohea hei tuku whakamōhio me tō whakautu mā te tātauira urupare Arotake.
review_detail.review_info_helptext: Whakatenatena i ngā kiritaki ki te whakarerekē i ā rātou arotake mā te tiri i tētahi Hononga Arotake
review_detail.share_review: Tiria te arotake hei hononga tūmatanui

title: Whakahaere whakaaro

banner_message: Ka whiwhi i te whakapau kōrero i whakaputaina mai i te toa whakaputa, ka whiwhi i te whakararuraru iti i te wā e whakapau kōrero ana i te toa whakaputa.

filter.search_reviews: Rapua mā te īmēra, hua, taitara, ihirangi rānei...
